name: elm-mcp
description: MCP server for IBM Engineering Lifecycle Management (ELM) — DOORS Next, EWM, ETM, GCM, and SCM/code-review — driven by AI assistants like Claude, IBM Bob, Cursor, and VS Code.
long_description: Talk to IBM ELM from any MCP-speaking AI assistant. Read and write requirements (with rich text, tables, images), create modules with auto-bound requirements, transition work items through their workflow, query work items with OSLC filters, create defects, link any two artifacts, inspect change-sets and code reviews, and chart your ELM data. 35 tools covering the full requirements-to-test lifecycle. Personal passion project — not an official IBM product. Use at your own risk.

elm_url.title: ELM Server URL
elm_url.description: Base URL of your IBM ELM server, e.g. https://yourcompany.elm.ibmcloud.com (the path /rm /ccm /qm is added automatically — paste the bare server URL).

elm_username.title: ELM Username
elm_username.description: Your ELM login username. The same credentials cover DNG, EWM, ETM, GCM, and SCM.

elm_password.title: ELM Password
elm_password.description: Your ELM password. Stored locally only — never transmitted to Smithery or any third party.
